  1. sudokusolver.sudoku
  2. Sudoku

Uses of Class
sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku

Packages that use Sudoku
Package
Description
sudokusolver.sudoku
Models the core domain, structural components, and high-level abstractions of a Sudoku puzzle.
sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
Contains classes extending the abstract SudokuRule class.

  • Uses of Sudoku in sudokusolver.sudoku

    Methods in sudokusolver.sudoku with parameters of type Sudoku
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Set<Cell>
    SudokuRule.affectedCells(Sudoku sudoku)
    Identifies and returns all board cells that are actively constrained by this specific rule.
    abstract Set<Constraint>
    SudokuRule.apply(Sudoku sudoku)
    Translates this high-level Sudoku rule into a set of lower-level CSP constraints bound to the current game configuration.
